title: Provenance Record
description: Reusable provenance schema for all Spectrum Systems artifacts.

record_type.description: Artifact type the provenance is attached to.

source_location.description: Section, page, paragraph, or timecode of the source content.

source_revision.description: Revision identifier of the source document.

resolved_against_revision.description: Revision the artifact was validated or resolved against.

workflow_step.description: Step name or number within the workflow.

generated_by_system.description: Name of the automation system (e.g., SYS-001 Comment Resolution Engine).

generated_by_repo.description: Repository that produced the artifact (implementation repo slug).

generated_by_version.description: Version tag or commit of the implementation repository.

policy_id.description: Explicit governing policy identifier with semantic version suffix.

prompt_version.description: Version of the prompt template used, when applicable.

schema_version.description: Version of the provenance schema enforced when producing this artifact.

derived_from.description: Parent artifact or dataset identifiers used to generate this record.

review_status.description: Human review state of this artifact.

confidence_score.description: Confidence assigned to the artifact or step.
